name: agentic-runner
description: 対象 jobsite の Git root に .agentic-runner 状態を置き、固定ロール scaffold、有限階層の supervised scoped assignment packet、intake / planning / audit、source-change gate、DEBUG 根本原因ゲート、self-host gate を支援する。

interface.shortDescription: Target-repo workflow state, scoped assignments, handoff/audit, source CLI, and self-host/debug/source-change gates.
interface.longDescription: Resolves the jobsite or explicit --target-cwd repository, stores .agentic-runner state under that target git root, and records a fixed role scaffold plus optional supervised scoped assignment packets for parent-managed specialist work. It supports finite delegation depth, heartbeat-based long-running worker supervision, stale-safe cancellation rules, intake, planning, audit, source-change metacognitive gating, debug root-cause integrity, metacognitive context-impact checks, and an explicit self-host gate so Agentic Runner source edits remain external-supervised by default.
defaultPrompt: Run Agentic Runner intake for this target repo.
Create supervised Agentic Runner scoped assignment packets for this active task.
Audit Agentic Runner self-host conditions before source edits.
